scripts.prisma:migrate:env: npx dotenv-cli -e ./.env -- npx prisma migrate dev --schema ./backend/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:migrate:local: npx dotenv-cli -e ./.env.local -- npx prisma migrate dev --schema ./backend/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:migrate:neon: npx dotenv-cli -e ./.env.neon -- npx prisma migrate dev --schema ./backend/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:status:env: npx dotenv-cli -e ./.env -- npx prisma migrate status --schema ./backend/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:status:local: npx dotenv-cli -e ./.env.local -- npx prisma migrate status --schema ./backend/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:status:neon: npx dotenv-cli -e ./.env.neon -- npx prisma migrate status --schema ./backend/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:reset:env: npx dotenv-cli -e ./.env -- npx prisma migrate reset --schema ./backend/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:reset:local: npx dotenv-cli -e ./.env.local -- npx prisma migrate reset --schema ./backend/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:reset:neon: npx dotenv-cli -e ./.env.neon -- npx prisma migrate reset --schema ./backend/prisma/schema.prisma
